description_long: This is an ornate, gold-toned brooch featuring a symmetrical design with outstretched wings and a central circular medallion. The medallion is bordered by intricate patterns and contains a reddish accent, possibly an enamel or gemstone, at its center. The wings are finely detailed with feather engravings, and the body of the brooch includes additional decorative flourishes such as scrollwork and a shield-like motif. The overall shape is elongated horizontally, with the wings forming the widest part and the central medallion providing a focal point. The surface appears polished and reflective, suggesting a high-quality metal finish. This piece is likely intended as a statement accessory, suitable for attachment to clothing such as a lapel or uniform.
description: A gold-toned, winged brooch with a central medallion and intricate decorative details, featuring a reddish accent at its center.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full symmetrical wing span, central medallion, and detailed engravings.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the thickness of the brooch and the three-dimensional relief of the wings and medallion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the wings and the base of the central medallion, with less visible detail.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, again emphasizing the depth and raised features of the brooch's design.
